calendar.matters:
Petition For Settlement, For Allowance Of Statutory Commissions And Attorneys Fees And Decree Of Distribution Under Intestate Succession
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard Watson for Aneesha Vikas Joshi, Administrator (via Zoom).

Discussion was held regarding the absence of Ms. Joshi's former attorney Joshua Ko. Mr. Watson stated that his office is not affiliated with Mr. Ko and has made extensive efforts to contact him, including outreach through multiple email addresses, telephone numbers, and mailing addresses obtained from the State Bar and other sources. Despite these efforts, Mr. Ko has remained unresponsive. Counsel also noted that Mr. Ko may have filed for personal bankruptcy, and his bankruptcy attorney was likewise unable to assist in locating him.

The Court acknowledged these efforts and imposed sanctions against Mr. Ko in the amount of $250 for failure to appear.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear (Aneesha Vikas Joshi)
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Off Calendar

Petition For Settlement, For Allowance Of Statutory Commissions And Attorneys Fees And Decree Of Distribution Under Intestate Succession
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Continued To Jun-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aneesha Vikas Joshi, Administrator (via Zoom).

Ms. Joshi reported that she had not heard from her attorney Joshua Ko since January. Despite repeated attempts by her and another attorney to contact him via email and text, there has been no communication. Ms. Joshi apologized to the Court and inquired about options to proceed.

The court continued the matter to June 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause re: Sanctions was issued to attorney Joshua Ko and set for hearing on the same date. The Court encouraged Ms. Joshi to have any new attorney submit any relevant documents prior to the next calling of the case.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Settlement, For Allowance Of Statutory Commissions And Attorneys Fees And Decree Of Distribution Under Intestate Succession
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Continued To Apr-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Joshua Ko, Esq., for Aneesha Joshi, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel reports as to the delay in addressing the issues as advised by the court. Mr. Ko requests a continuance.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-29-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

Petition For Settlement, For Allowance Of Statutory Commissions And Attorneys Fees And Decree Of Distribution Under Intestate Succession
Off Calendar Dec-10-2024 Continued To Jan-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Off Calendar

Petition For Settlement, For Allowance Of Statutory Commissions And Attorneys Fees And Decree Of Distribution Under Intestate Succession
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Continued To Dec-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Continued To Nov-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joshua Ko appeared by zoom for Aneesha Joshi (administrator).

Mr. Ko stated that he filed a petition in July, but it was rejected and that he filed a petition for final distribution on Friday. The court noted that the corrected supplemental inventory and appraisal that was filed on July 16, 2024, had a signed verification dated December 31, 2023, but the appraisal was not done by the probate referee until March 22, 2024. Mr. Ko stated that it was a typo on his part, that he does not know how that happened and that it should have been dated March 21, 2024. The First and Final Accounting and Report, etc. is continued to November 13, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Continued To Sep-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joshua Ko appeared by zoom for Aneesha Joshi (administrator).

Mr. Ko stated that he is dealing with some serious health issues, that he is winding down his practice, that this is his last case, that everything is done and that he submitted an inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution to file and serve on Tuesday. The Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause is off calendar. The Frist and Final Accounting and Report, etc. is continued to September 4, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

No appearance by any party or counsel.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Aneesha Vikas Joshi and her Attorney Joshua M. Ko to appear on December 13, 2023, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear. In addition, an Order to Show Cause will be issued to Attorney Joshua M. Ko to appear and explain why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Continued To Jun-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joshua Ko appeared by zoom for Aneesha Joshi (administrator).

The court noted that a recent filing was made and asked M. Ko why he did not come to court on March 13th. Mr. Ko apologized to the court for not appearing at the hearing stating that he made a calendaring error, that he switched firms and relocated to Southern California, and that he periodically checked the calendar schedule, but he dropped the ball. The court does not find this to be good cause and orders sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Mr. Ko which are payable to the Clerk of the Court within 10 days. Status on close of estate is continued to June 5, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear/order to show cause is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Aneesha Vikas Joshi and the Attorney Joshua M. Ko to appear on May 1, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why a corrected inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for the same date for counsel to appear and show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on close of estate, and status on filing of a corrected inventory and appraisal are also continued to May 1, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-03-2023 Continued To Mar-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joshua Ko, via Zoom, for Aneesha V. Joshi, Personal Representative.

The court reminds counsel that at last calling of this matter in November 2022, he advised that he was in the process of finalizing a petition which has not yet been filed. Mr. Ko reports as to the issue causing the delay in filing the petition and advises that he intends to file a petition for final distribution. The court and counsel discuss the issue regarding the assets included in the Inventory and Appraisal (I&A) which appear to be non-cash assets. Counsel confirms that Vaulted Gold Investment Royal, etc., and 4PSGroup LLC Investment, shown in the I&A, are cash assets. The court instructs counsel to file a supplemental I&A to clarify the assets in question.

The subject matters are continued to Mar-13-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Mr. Ko offers as status of this matter and requests a continuance of three months. The court confirms with Mr. Ko that a petition for approval of report on status of administration is drafted and ready for signature and that he intends to file the petition and at the very least a partial Inventory and Appraisal soon.

The matter is continued to Nov-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Filing of Inventory and Appraisal is set for the same date.
